prompt: Hand category: second pair. Board fit: the hand has showdown value, but top pair and stronger made hands are still available. Classify the range bucket.
why_v1: Medium means the hand has real made-hand value, but stronger made hands are still common.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. This is medium because second pair fits the board, yet top pair and stronger hands can still be ahead.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. This is medium because the board fit gives made-hand value without making it one of the strongest buckets.
